title: genrtlil: Fix displaying debug info in packages
body:
Discovered while working on https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/pull/3050

When packages are processed, they don't have current_ast_mod set and when some error occurs while processing package, it results in segmentation fault.

This PR adds check if current_ast_mod is set and if so, it displays whole module AST, if not it only displays AST of current node.
